title: AfricanSTN launches — building the African sports tech ecosystem
excerpt: African Sports Technology Network (AfricanSTN) is now live. Here is what we are building and why.
body:
AfricanSTN is the ecosystem platform for sports technology in Africa. We are in our early stages, building the foundations for a network that brings together founders, sport organisations, investors, operators, and partners across the region.

By joining now, you become part of our early supporter community - the first group we reach out to as the platform develops.

fr.title: AfricanSTN se lance — bâtir l'écosystème africain de la sport tech
fr.excerpt: Le African Sports Technology Network (AfricanSTN) est désormais en ligne. Voici ce que nous construisons et pourquoi.

pt.title: A AfricanSTN é lançada — a construir o ecossistema africano de tecnologia desportiva
pt.excerpt: A African Sports Technology Network (AfricanSTN) já está online. Eis o que estamos a construir e porquê.

ar.title: إطلاق AfricanSTN — بناء منظومة تكنولوجيا الرياضة في أفريقيا
ar.excerpt: شبكة تكنولوجيا الرياضة الأفريقية (AfricanSTN) متاحة الآن. إليكم ما نبنيه ولماذا.

sw.title: AfricanSTN yazinduliwa — kujenga mfumo wa teknolojia ya michezo barani Afrika
sw.excerpt: Mtandao wa Teknolojia ya Michezo wa Afrika (AfricanSTN) sasa upo mtandaoni. Haya ndiyo tunayojenga na kwa nini.

title: The State of Sport in Africa — Edition 1
excerpt: The first edition of AfricanSTN's flagship report examining the current state of sport across the African continent — covering governance, infrastructure, commercial development, and the role of technology in shaping the future of African sport.
body:
## The State of Sport in Africa — Edition 1

This is the first edition of AfricanSTN's flagship report on the state of sport across the African continent.

The report provides a comprehensive overview of the African sport landscape, examining the key factors shaping sport development, commercialisation, and technology adoption across the region.

Download the full report using the link below.

fr.title: L'état du sport en Afrique — Édition 1
fr.excerpt: La première édition du rapport phare d'AfricanSTN examinant l'état actuel du sport sur le continent africain — gouvernance, infrastructures, développement commercial et rôle de la technologie dans l'avenir du sport africain.

pt.title: O Estado do Desporto em África — Edição 1
pt.excerpt: A primeira edição do relatório de referência da AfricanSTN que analisa o estado atual do desporto no continente africano — abrangendo governação, infraestruturas, desenvolvimento comercial e o papel da tecnologia na definição do futuro do desporto africano.

ar.title: حالة الرياضة في أفريقيا — الإصدار الأول
ar.excerpt: الإصدار الأول من التقرير الرئيسي لـ AfricanSTN الذي يستعرض الوضع الراهن للرياضة في القارة الأفريقية — ويشمل الحوكمة والبنية التحتية والتطور التجاري ودور التكنولوجيا في تشكيل مستقبل الرياضة الأفريقية.

sw.title: Hali ya Michezo Barani Afrika — Toleo la Kwanza
sw.excerpt: Toleo la kwanza la ripoti kuu ya AfricanSTN inayochunguza hali ya sasa ya michezo katika bara la Afrika — ikishughulikia utawala, miundombinu, maendeleo ya kibiashara, na nafasi ya teknolojia katika kuunda mustakabali wa michezo ya Afrika.
